title: Front Office Manager - Zomato Restaurant Partners Consulting Pvt Ltd - Immediate Joiners Preferred
company: Zomato Restaurant Partners Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - Zomato Restaurant Partners Consulting Pvt Ltd - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Zomato Restaurant Partners Consulting Pvt Ltd is actively seeking a talented and motivated Front Office Manager to join our dynamic team in Pune. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Zomato Restaurant Partners Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Zomato Restaurant Partners Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in F&B Service

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zomato Restaurant Partners Consulting Pvt Ltd!
